raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "declaring a behavioral commitment to a specific spiritual practice of prayer and meditation aimed at aligning with a personally understood higher power",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a God or higher power exists and has a discernible will",
    "prayer and meditation can improve conscious contact with that higher power",
    "seeking only knowledge of that will and the power to enact it is both possible and desirable",
    "this practice constitutes meaningful behavioral change or value alignment"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent within a theistic or spiritually open framework; the qualifier 'as we understood Him' preserves personal interpretation while presupposing the efficacy of directed prayer",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the individual accepts the existence of a higher power, values conscious contact with it, and experiences the practice as supporting recovery or ethical living",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is treated as empirically validated, universally applicable regardless of theistic belief, or presented as a guaranteed mechanism rather than a faith-based commitment"
}
